tools.name: authentication.requestAccessToken
tools.description: This is the means by which clients obtain access tokens to use the service. You can see how to construct an Ably TokenRequest in the [Ably TokenRequest spec](https://www.ably.io/documentation/rest-api/token-request-spec) documentation, although we recommend you use an Ably SDK rather to create a TokenRequest, as the construction of a TokenRequest is complex. The resulting token response object contains the token properties as defined in Ably TokenRequest spec. Authentication is not required if using a Signed TokenRequest.

tools.name: history.getMessagesByChannel
tools.description: Get message history for a channel

tools.name: history.getPresenceHistoryOfChannel
tools.description: Get presence on a channel

tools.name: publishing.publishMessagesToChannel
tools.description: Publish a message to the specified channel

tools.name: push.deletePushDeviceDetails
tools.description: Delete a device details object.

tools.name: push.getChannelsWithPushSubscribers
tools.description: Returns a paginated response of channel names.

tools.name: push.getPushDeviceDetails
tools.description: Get the full details of a device.

tools.name: push.getPushSubscriptionsOnChannels
tools.description: Get a list of push notification subscriptions to channels.

tools.name: push.getRegisteredPushDevices
tools.description: List of device details of devices registed for push notifications.

tools.name: push.patchPushDeviceDetails
tools.description: Specific attributes of an existing registration can be updated. Only clientId, metadata and push.recipient are mutable.

tools.name: push.publishPushNotificationToDevices
tools.description: A convenience endpoint to deliver a push notification payload to a single device or set of devices identified by their client identifier.

tools.name: push.putPushDeviceDetails
tools.description: Device registrations can be upserted (the existing registration is replaced entirely) with a PUT operation. Only clientId, metadata and push.recipient are mutable.

tools.name: push.registerPushDevice
tools.description: Register a device’s details, including the information necessary to deliver push notifications to it. Requires "push-admin" capability.

tools.name: push.subscribePushDeviceToChannel
tools.description: Subscribe either a single device or all devices associated with a client ID to receive push notifications from messages sent to a channel.

tools.name: push.unregisterAllPushDevices
tools.description: Unregisters devices. All their subscriptions for receiving push notifications through channels will also be deleted.

tools.name: push.unregisterPushDevice
tools.description: Unregisters a single device by its device ID. All its subscriptions for receiving push notifications through channels will also be deleted.

tools.name: push.updatePushDeviceDetails
tools.description: Gets an updated device details object.

tools.name: stats.getStats
tools.description: The Ably system can be queried to obtain usage statistics for a given application, and results are provided aggregated across all channels in use in the application in the specified period. Stats may be used to track usage against account quotas.

tools.name: stats.getTime
tools.description: This returns the service time in milliseconds since the epoch.

tools.name: status.getMetadataOfAllChannels
tools.description: Enumerate all active channels of the application

tools.name: status.getMetadataOfChannel
tools.description: Get metadata of a channel

tools.name: status.getPresenceOfChannel
tools.description: Get presence on a channel

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
